name: preview_open
description: Show and initialize a collaborative browser tab. Pass tabId to reuse a specific existing tab, set reuseExistingTab=false to create another tab, or omit both to use this agent session's current tab.

tabId.description: Exact collaborative browser tab to target. Omit to use this agent session's current tab.

allOf.description: Absolute http(s) URL or a schemeless host such as t3.chat or localhost:5173. Schemeless public hosts use https; loopback hosts use http.

url.description: Optional initial page URL, for example https://t3.chat or localhost:5173. Omit to open a blank tab.

anyOf.description: Whether to reveal the preview panel to the human. Defaults to true.
Reuse tabId when supplied, otherwise this agent session's current tab. Defaults to true; set false to create a new tab.
